description: 20-question evaluation set for the ArXiv RAG Research Assistant. 15 AI/ML questions and 5 quantitative finance questions. A retrieval is scored as correct (Hit@5) when at least one of the top-5 retrieved chunks contains >= min_keyword_matches of the expected_keywords (case-insensitive substring match).

scoring.primary: Hit Rate@5 — fraction of questions where the top-5 contains ≥1 relevant chunk
scoring.secondary: MRR — mean reciprocal rank of the first relevant chunk across all questions

questions.question: What is the attention mechanism and how is it used in transformer models?
How does BERT use masked language modeling for pre-training?
What is LoRA and how does it reduce the cost of fine-tuning large language models?
How do diffusion models generate images through iterative denoising?
What is RLHF and how is it used to align language models with human preferences?
How does the Vision Transformer (ViT) differ from convolutional neural networks for image recognition?
What is knowledge distillation and how is it used to compress large neural networks?
How does contrastive learning enable self-supervised representation learning?
What are the key differences between LSTM and transformer models for sequence modelling?
How does retrieval-augmented generation prevent hallucination in language model outputs?
How does FlashAttention reduce memory requirements of the attention computation?
What are mixture-of-experts models and how do they scale neural network capacity?
What do neural scaling laws say about the relationship between model size, data, and performance?
How are graph neural networks applied to node classification problems?
How does in-context learning allow large language models to perform tasks without gradient updates?
How are neural networks applied to predicting stock returns and market movements?
What reinforcement learning techniques are applied to algorithmic trading strategies?
How are transformer architectures adapted for forecasting financial time series?
What machine learning methods are used for portfolio construction and risk-adjusted optimisation?
How is NLP used to extract sentiment signals from financial news and earnings reports?
